verified.name: ipapi.co
verified.tagline: IP address to city, region, country, and coordinates
verified.description: Point it at any IP address (or none, for the caller's own) and it hands back location, network, timezone, and currency details as clean JSON. No key needed for light use; it answers with a 429 once you cross its quota.
verified.freeTier: Free — quota not published; returns 429 when exceeded

verified.name: Pinball Map
verified.tagline: Crowdsourced map of public pinball machines worldwide
verified.description: A community-maintained directory of where to find real, playable pinball machines, organized by region. The keyless REST API lists regions, locations, and machines as JSON; maintainers just ask for attribution and no bulk hammering.
verified.rateLimit: No hard limit; heavy/bulk use may be blocked

verified.name: Postali
verified.tagline: Keyless postal-code lookup for Mexico, Colombia & Spain
verified.description: Resolve a postal code to its state, municipality, and neighborhoods across MX, CO, and ES with a single GET. No key, no signup, and CDN-cached JSON; a bare code with no country prefix defaults to Mexico.
verified.freeTier: Free — no key, no signup, no monthly limit (per site)

verified.name: Postcodes.io
verified.tagline: Free UK postcode lookup and geolocation, no key
verified.description: Hand it a UK postcode and get back coordinates, ward, district, constituency, and administrative geography as JSON. Open source and free, with reverse-geocoding and autocomplete endpoints alongside the basic lookup.
verified.dataLicense: Service MIT-licensed; postcode data license unverified

verified.name: SLF
verified.tagline: German word-game data: cities, countries, rivers by letter
verified.description: A static JSON dataset for the German 'Stadt, Land, Fluss' game, grouping example cities, countries, rivers, names, jobs, animals, brands, and plants under each starting letter. One keyless GET returns the whole letter-keyed object.
verified.notes: A static JSON dataset for the Stadt-Land-Fluss word game, not a query API.

verified.name: Brazil
verified.tagline: Community API for Brazilian public data (CEP, CNPJ, banks…)
verified.description: A single friendly gateway to scattered Brazilian public datasets — postal codes (CEP), companies (CNPJ), banks, DDD area codes, holidays and more. This sample resolves a CEP to its street, neighborhood, city, and state. Keyless, but the maintainers ask you not to loop through every code.
verified.rateLimit: Fair use — no loops or full-range scanning

verified.name: City, Toronto Open Data
verified.tagline: Toronto's open data catalog via a standard CKAN API
verified.description: The City of Toronto publishes its open data through a standard CKAN backend. This endpoint lists every dataset package by id; from there you can pull each package's metadata and downloadable resources. Keyless JSON, though it didn't advertise CORS headers.
verified.notes: Standard CKAN action API; no access-control-allow-origin header observed.

verified.name: LocalGov.jp
verified.tagline: Structured Japanese municipal grants & subsidies data
verified.description: Normalizes grant and subsidy listings from 1,600+ Japanese municipalities into one searchable JSON API, each record linking back to the original government page. This search returns matching grants with issuer, prefecture, and eligibility. Currently free; an x402/USDC rail exists for future paid features.

items.title: 子育て家庭を応援します！（子育て支援金）

verified.freeTier: Free — all endpoints currently free (per llms.txt)
verified.notes: Free routes enumerated at /.well-known/x402; optional x402/USDC payment rail reserved for future capabilities.

verified.name: Open Government, Poland
verified.tagline: Poland's national open-data portal as a JSON:API
verified.description: dane.gov.pl exposes Poland's open-data catalog through a versioned JSON:API. This endpoint pages through 25,000+ datasets with their titles, licenses, and modification dates; drill in for resources and downloads. Keyless, and many datasets carry CC0 or CC BY licenses.

verified.name: OpenMercantil
verified.tagline: Search Spanish companies and BORME event timelines
verified.description: Look up Spanish companies by name and get back their CIF, slug, status, and activity counts, with deeper BORME (official gazette) event timelines available per company. No auth, open CORS, JSON only.

verified.name: LAPIS
verified.tagline: Query aggregated SARS-CoV-2 genomic sequence data
verified.description: LAPIS (from CoV-Spectrum/GenSpectrum) serves aggregated statistics over open SARS-CoV-2 sequences — filter by mutation, lineage, date, or location and get counts back. This open instance needs no key and returns JSON, handy for genomic-epidemiology dashboards.

verified.name: Longevity World Cup
verified.tagline: Biological-age competition data with biomarkers & rankings
verified.description: Public leaderboard data from a biological-age contest: each athlete entry carries a division, country, and a set of blood and metabolic biomarkers. One GET returns the full athlete array as JSON, no key required.
verified.notes: Response contains personal health biomarkers and some contact emails; MediaContact field omitted from this sample.

verified.name: Open Disease
verified.tagline: Free COVID-19 and influenza statistics, no key
verified.description: disease.sh aggregates COVID-19 and influenza numbers from JHU, Worldometers, and other sources into one keyless JSON API. This endpoint returns global totals — cases, deaths, recovered, tests, and per-million rates. Free to use for widgets, dashboards, or apps.

verified.name: AI Dev Jobs
verified.tagline: AI/ML engineering job listings, built for agents
verified.description: Aggregates AI/ML developer jobs and exposes them through open REST (plus RSS and MCP) endpoints designed for agentic access. This search returns listings with title, company, and description. Public reads are free; an optional free key gives a stable identity and higher throttle.
verified.rateLimit: Hourly abuse throttle; optional free API key

verified.name: Arbeitnow
verified.description: A single JSON feed of jobs aggregated from a European/remote job board, each entry carrying company, title, description, tags, location, and a remote flag. Keyless GET and paginated — good for building job widgets or feeds.

skipped.name: LatLng
skipped.reason: All endpoints require an API key (X-Api-Key / key param) per docs; no keyless JSON GET.

skipped.name: US Federal Contracts & Grants
skipped.reason: Data endpoints (/contracts, /grants) return 401 requiring an API key via RapidAPI despite the keyless listing; only /ping and /health are open.

skipped.name: Covid-19
skipped.reason: mmediagroup API returns HTTP 403 'Missing Authentication Token' on /v1/cases across 3 attempts (deployment down/changed).

skipped.name: Covid-19 Government Response
skipped.reason: Oxford OxCGRT API host covidtrackerapi.bsg.ox.ac.uk is NXDOMAIN (service discontinued).

skipped.name: Covid-19 JHU CSSE
skipped.reason: All hosted instances dead: covid19-api.nuttaphat.com has no DNS record and the Azure fallback times out.

skipped.name: Covid-19 Philippines
skipped.reason: Heroku-hosted API returns 404 'No such app' (free dynos retired); no live keyless endpoint.

skipped.name: Open Government, Norway
skipped.reason: data.norge.no is a Next.js catalog UI; docsUrl exposes no documented keyless JSON GET and guessed endpoints returned 404/403 (Invalid CORS request).

skipped.name: DevITjobs UK
skipped.reason: Only a job_feed.xml (XML) feed is public; the GraphQL API needs POST. No keyless JSON GET endpoint.
